lemon_market_new_listings.description: This car is in mint, showroom condition.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and minor dents. The interior shows significant wear on the upholstery. Mechanical components are functional, though some maintenance is required.

The car is in fair condition. The exterior has several scratches and the interior shows significant wear. While the vehicle is currently operational, it requires some mechanical repairs and routine maintenance.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been consistently well-maintained throughout its ownership. The engine starts up reliably and runs smoothly, and the transmission shifts through all gears without hesitation. The exterior shows some minor signs of normal use, including a few small stone chips on the hood, but the paint still holds a nice shine. Inside, the cabin is clean and comfortable, though there is some light wear on the driver's seat bolster. All electronics and features are fully functional. This car represents a dependable option for anyone seeking a well-cared-for vehicle that is ready for daily use.

Step into luxury with this absolutely pristine vehicle! It is in showroom condition, looking and driving exactly like it did the day it rolled off the lot. Every detail has been meticulously cared for, from the flawless exterior to the spotless interior. This is a rare opportunity to own a car that has been kept in such exceptional, like-new shape. It's truly a top-tier find for any driver looking for perfection!

This vehicle is in fair condition and shows clear signs of its history and use. The exterior has several noticeable scratches, a few small dings, and some minor paint fading on the roof. Inside, the cabin is functional but shows wear on the driver's seat and some staining on the floor mats. Mechanically, the car runs and drives well, though it is due for some routine maintenance soon, including new tires and a brake inspection. This is a reliable option for someone looking for a practical vehicle at a lower price point who is comfortable with some cosmetic imperfections.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a distinguished combination of performance and reliability. Presenting in commendable condition, it features a well-preserved interior and a robust mechanical profile. An ideal selection for the discerning driver seeking exceptional value without compromising on executive presence.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It's in really solid shape and has been super well-taken care of over the years. It's the perfect dependable car that still looks fantastic on the road and is ready for its next adventure. I’ve loved every mile in it, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it! Feel free to reach out if you have any questions—I'd love to chat!

This 996.2-generation Carrera 4S is a mechanically sound example featuring the naturally aspirated 3.6L flat-six engine equipped with VarioCam Plus. Power is delivered through a precise G96 6-speed manual transaxle to a viscous-clutch all-wheel-drive system. The wide-body chassis, shared with the 996 Turbo, provides increased track width and superior lateral stability. Critical preventative maintenance has been addressed, including an IMS bearing retrofit and a fresh Rear Main Seal (RMS). The braking system utilizes factory 'Big Red' four-piston monobloc calipers over cross-drilled rotors, ensuring minimal fade and consistent modulation. The suspension geometry remains tight, offering the communicative feedback and analog steering feel expected of a true driver-focused 911. Well-sorted and ready for spirited use.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Clean title. Well-maintained. Minor cosmetic wear only. Runs well.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of performance and everyday reliability. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish, showing only minor road wear consistent with careful ownership. Inside, the cabin remains a smoke-free environment with supple upholstery and a dashboard that looks remarkably fresh; every button, switch, and digital interface functions exactly as intended. Under the hood, the engine delivers smooth, responsive power, backed by a consistent service history that reflects pride of ownership. The transmission shifts seamlessly, and the suspension provides a composed, quiet ride over any surface. Recently fitted with a fresh set of premium tires and having passed a comprehensive mechanical inspection, this car is ready for the road. It represents a fantastic opportunity for a buyer seeking a well-cared-for vehicle that looks and drives beautifully.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, which offers a superior balance of performance and long-term reliability. Having undergone a comprehensive mechanical evaluation, this unit demonstrates consistent care and remains in commendable condition for its next owner. This represents a distinguished opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a high-caliber driving experience and proven durability.

This exceptional vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it offers a harmonious blend of mechanical reliability and sophisticated styling. Every aspect of this automobile has been thoroughly inspected to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and safety. With a documented service history and a clean, well-appointed interior, this model provides a superior driving experience at a highly competitive market value.

Hey friends! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, she’s been such a gem. It’s in really great shape and has tons of life left to give! Whether you’re commuting or hitting the road for a weekend getaway, this car handles like a charm. I’ve truly loved driving it, and I know you will too! Feel free to reach out if you want to come see it!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and a crisp 8,000 RPM redline. Mated to a Getrag 6-speed manual, the drivetrain delivers linear power through a factory limited-slip differential. Chassis integrity is prioritized with documented rear subframe reinforcement and a recently refreshed VANOS system. Suspended on Bilstein B16 dampers for sharpened turn-in and reduced body roll, this car balances mechanical purity with daily usability. Minor cosmetic patina is present, but the powertrain remains robust and high-revving. A mechanically sound specimen for the purist.
Clean title. Well maintained. Minor exterior wear. Engine runs strong. Interior clean. Ready for immediate use.

Presenting a well-cared-for vehicle that strikes the perfect balance between luxury and reliability. The exterior features a vibrant finish that catches the light beautifully, showing only minimal, expected wear such as small nicks on the front bumper from highway travel. The alloy wheels are free of major curb rash, and the tires maintain healthy tread for the seasons ahead. Inside, the cabin remains inviting and strictly odor-free; the premium upholstery is well-preserved, with only light natural creasing on the driver’s side bolster. Every feature, from the responsive infotainment screen to the dual-zone climate control, functions exactly as intended. Under the hood, the engine runs quietly and the transmission shifts seamlessly, reflecting a history of consistent, on-time maintenance. This car comes with a documented service history and has recently undergone a full multi-point inspection, ensuring it is ready for its next owner to drive away with total confidence.

Presenting an expertly maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and sophisticated design. This unit has been thoroughly vetted to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for roadworthiness and aesthetic appeal. Offering a refined driving experience and consistent performance, it represents an outstanding acquisition for the discerning professional seeking both quality and value.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it serves as a testament to responsible ownership. Fully inspected and prepared for immediate delivery, this unit offers a balanced synthesis of performance and long-term value.

Hey there! I’m looking to find a new home for this awesome ride. It’s in great shape and has been super reliable for me—perfect for someone who needs a dependable car that still looks sharp on the road. It's been well-loved and is ready for many more miles of adventures with you! Come take it for a spin and see for yourself.

Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Runs smooth.

This vehicle represents a well-maintained example of its class, offering a perfect balance of reliability and comfort. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish, though close inspection reveals minor road-wear such as small stone chips on the front fascia and a light scratch on the passenger-side door handle. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health; the engine pulls strong, the transmission shifts are crisp, and the suspension remains firm yet compliant over bumps. Inside, the cabin has been kept clean and smoke-free. The premium upholstery is intact, showing only slight softening on the driver’s side bolster from regular use. All technological features—including the dual-zone climate control, navigation, and heated seats—are fully operational. With a comprehensive service history and recent fluid changes, this car is ready for its next owner to drive away with confidence.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, representing a premier opportunity for the discerning motorist. This unit demonstrates consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic profile, reflecting a history of diligent care and professional upkeep. Engineered for sustained performance and reliability, it offers a refined driving experience that aligns with the highest standards of its class. We invite serious inquiries to appreciate the superior value and proven longevity of this distinguished automobile.
